notes:
v1.1.1 Hotfix
- Fixed existing Relationship note Edit and Delete buttons remaining disabled for GMs and other authorized editors.

v1.1.0 Update
- Relationships can share details or party-wide rank and progress across selected Actors.
- Player Gifts can require active-GM approval, and Event Log entries can be revealed at a configured rank.
- Gift lists can be limited to selected Item types.
- The progress integration API lets connected modules read visible rank data and apply retry-safe progress changes.

announcement.title: 🔗 Stylish Relationship Tracker v1.1.1
announcement.content:
Stylish Relationship Tracker v1.1.1 fixes Relationship note controls.

  • Existing notes can once again be edited or deleted by GMs and other authorized editors.

v1.1.0 added shared Relationships and new GM controls.

  • Relationships can share details or party-wide rank and progress across selected Actors while GM notes and per-Actor permissions remain local.
  • Player Gifts can require active-GM approval, and Event Log entries can reveal at a configured rank.
  • Gift lists can be limited to selected Item types.
  • The progress integration API supports connected modules such as Stylish Shop.
